fields.name: meta
fields.label: Meta & SEO
fields.description: Browser tab title, social share previews, theme color.

fields.name: theme_color
fields.label: Theme color (browser UI tint)
fields.description: e.g. #f7f2ea

fields.name: comingSoon
fields.label: Coming Soon splash
fields.description: Pre-launch password gate. Turn off to launch publicly.

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.description: What visitors type to get past the splash. Lowercase, no spaces.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Big title
fields.description: Wrap italic word in *asterisks*. e.g. '*coming* soon.'

fields.name: overlayNav
fields.label: Overlay menu
fields.description: The full-screen nav that opens from the three dots.

fields.name: anchor
fields.label: Anchor or URL
fields.description: Like #menu, #book, or a full URL.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Big title
fields.description: Each new line becomes a new line on screen. Wrap italic words in *asterisks*.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Hero image
fields.description: Photo of the room, a hand at work, a moment of light. Replaces the placeholder. Leave blank to keep the cream placeholder.

fields.name: image_alt
fields.label: Hero image alt text
fields.description: Short description for screen readers. Leave blank if no image.

fields.name: frame_label
fields.label: Image caption (optional)
fields.description: Small italic text that overlays the placeholder. Leave blank for none.

fields.name: chip_label
fields.label: Hero chip (e.g., 'now booking')
fields.description: Floating chip on the hero image. Leave blank to hide.

fields.name: dt
fields.label: Number/word
fields.description: e.g. 'one', '60 min+', 'no'

fields.name: dd
fields.label: Caption
fields.description: e.g. 'face at a time, by appointment'

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Newlines = new lines. *italic* allowed.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Pillar title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: image
fields.label: Studio photo
fields.description: A photo of the treatment room or hands at work. Leave blank to keep the placeholder.

fields.name: note
fields.label: Small caption at the top of the menu

fields.name: img_key
fields.label: Image key (internal slug)
fields.description: Lowercase, hyphenated. Used internally; doesn't show on the site.

fields.name: duration
fields.label: Duration
fields.description: e.g. '90 min'

fields.name: price
fields.label: Price
fields.description: e.g. '$215'. Shown as a tag on the image. Leave blank to hide.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Service photo
fields.description: Optional photo for this service. Leave blank to keep the placeholder.

fields.name: aboutMei
fields.label: About / Meet Mei
fields.description: The 'meet the practitioner' section — bio, credentials, pull quote.

fields.name: enabled
fields.label: Show this section?
fields.description: Untick to hide the whole section without losing your edits.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed (e.g. 'meet *mei.*')

fields.name: image
fields.label: Photo of Mei
fields.description: Portrait or working-in-studio shot. Leave blank to keep the placeholder.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: image
fields.label: Background photo
fields.description: Wide editorial shot used as a soft background. Leave blank for the placeholder.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: name
fields.label: Location name
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: address
fields.label: Address
fields.description: New lines = visual line breaks.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Location photo
fields.description: Studio exterior or storefront. Leave blank to keep the placeholder.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Days label
fields.description: e.g. tue — fri

fields.name: faq
fields.label: FAQ accordion
fields.description: Questions visitors commonly ask. Tap a question on the site to reveal the answer.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

fields.name: seo
fields.label: SEO / structured data
fields.description: Used for Google's knowledge panel. Most fields are one-time setup.

fields.name: price_range
fields.label: Price range symbol
fields.description: $, $$, $$$ — shown on Google

fields.name: region
fields.label: Province / state code
fields.description: e.g. BC, CA, NY

fields.name: country
fields.label: Country code
fields.description: e.g. CA, US

fields.name: site_url
fields.label: Public site URL
fields.description: e.g. https://meiskinstudio.co

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: *italic* allowed

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
